name: kaola-workflow-gitea
description: Gitea edition of Kaola-Workflow for Codex, using Gitea issues, pull requests, tea, and repo-backed workflow artifacts.

interface.longDescription: Kaola-Workflow Gitea for Codex exposes repo-backed skills and Codex-native agent profiles for project initialization, workflow routing, research, ideation, planning, TDD execution, review, documentation docking, and finalization against Gitea issues and pull requests.
defaultPrompt: Use Kaola-Workflow Gitea for Codex in this repo.
Resume the current Kaola-Workflow Gitea project.
Run workflow-init for Kaola-Workflow Gitea for Codex.
